# Richard Djarbeng

> Richard Djarbeng's website with technical and personal posts. Tech blogs on AI, space, IoT, web development, software engineering, etc + real-life adventures in East Africa, USA and Europe. Supports Dark Mode. 

## Main Sections

- [Home](https://rdjarbeng.com/) - Technical articles, blog posts about web development, AI, and IoT devices.
- [About Me](https://rdjarbeng.com/about/) - Information about Richard Djarbeng, learning journey and reflections.
- [Contact](https://rdjarbeng.com/contact/) - How to get in touch with contact form.

## Content Collections

- [Personal Blog](https://rdjarbeng.com/personal/) - Reflections and stories from real-life adventures.
- [Posts](https://rdjarbeng.com/posts/) - Technical articles, blog posts about web development, AI, and IoT devices.
- [Gallery](https://rdjarbeng.com/gallery/) - A collection of images, and other media.
- [Memes](https://rdjarbeng.com/memes/) - A dedicated collection for tech and developer memes.
- [Videos](https://rdjarbeng.com/videos/) - Short clips and video insights from rdjareng.com featuring videos from Youtube, X/Twitter and Tiktok.
- [YouTube](https://rdjarbeng.com/youtube/) - Curated YouTube video embeds from rdjarbeng.com with multiple categories:
    - Film & Animation
    - Music
    - Gaming
    - Education
    - Entertainment
    - People & Blogs
    - Science & Technology
    - Travel & Events
    - Comedy
    - Sports
    - Behind the Scenes
    - Reviews & Reactions
    - Memes & Highlights
    - Interviews
    - Tutorials

## Navigation and Discovery

- [Search](https://rdjarbeng.com/search/) - Search through all posts and articles with dynamic UI and topic chips.
- [Categories](https://rdjarbeng.com/categories/) - Browse content by category (e.g., Tech, AI).
- [Tags](https://rdjarbeng.com/tags/) - Browse content by specific tags.
